category.scope_note: Home and clinical medical device comparison.

title.en: China-to-EU Medical Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国医疗器械进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國醫療器材進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China home and clinical medical device documentation against EU MDR 2017/745 conformity, Notified Body, EU Authorised Representative, EUDAMED, UDI, ISO 13485, and electrical-safety expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用/临床医疗器械文件与欧盟 MDR 2017/745 合格评定、公告机构、欧盟授权代表、EUDAMED、UDI、ISO 13485 和电气安全要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用/臨床醫療器材文件與歐盟 MDR 2017/745 合格評定、公告機構、歐盟授權代表、EUDAMED、UDI、ISO 13485 和電氣安全要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, CE conformity assessment, Notified Body opinion, clinical evaluation, QMS audit result, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and manufacturers should verify current EU MDR classification, conformity-assessment, authorised-representative, registration, UDI, post-market, labelling, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、CE 合格评定、公告机构意见、临床评价、质量体系审核结果、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和制造商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟 MDR 分类、合格评定、授权代表、注册、UDI、上市后、标签和进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、CE 合格評定、公告機構意見、臨床評價、品質系統審核結果、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和製造商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟 MDR 分類、合格評定、授權代表、註冊、UDI、上市後、標籤和進口商義務。

answer_first.en: EU MDR 2017/745 conformity, usually through a Notified Body, an EU Authorised Representative, EUDAMED and UDI obligations, and ISO 13485 QMS evidence are the main gaps beyond NMPA; IEC 60601 safety largely transfers from GB 9706.
answer_first.zh: 欧盟 MDR 2017/745 合格评定（通常需公告机构）、欧盟授权代表、EUDAMED 与 UDI 义务以及 ISO 13485 质量体系证明，是 NMPA 之外的主要差距；IEC 60601 安全要求大体可从 GB 9706 转移。
answer_first.zht: 歐盟 MDR 2017/745 合格評定（通常需公告機構）、歐盟授權代表、EUDAMED 與 UDI 義務以及 ISO 13485 品質系統證明，是 NMPA 之外的主要差距；IEC 60601 安全要求大體可從 GB 9706 轉移。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, harmonized-standard source, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Which regulation governs medical devices placed on the EU market, and does a Chinese manufacturer need a Notified Body?
q.zh: 欧盟医疗器械市场准入受哪项法规管辖？中国制造商是否需要公告机构？
q.zht: 歐盟醫療器材市場准入受哪項法規管轄？中國製造商是否需要公告機構？

a.en: EU MDR 2017/745 governs all medical devices placed on the EU market. Class IIa, IIb, and III devices require conformity assessment by an EU Notified Body before CE marking is applied; Class I devices (non-sterile, non-measuring, non-reusable surgical) may self-declare. NMPA registration does not confer CE marking.
a.zh: 《欧盟医疗器械法规》（MDR 2017/745）管辖所有在欧盟市场销售的医疗器械。IIa、IIb和III类器械须经欧盟公告机构合格评定后方可加贴CE标志；I类器械（非无菌、非测量、非可重复使用手术类）可自我声明。NMPA注册不授予CE标志。
a.zht: 《歐盟醫療器材法規》（MDR 2017/745）管轄所有在歐盟市場銷售的醫療器材。IIa、IIb和III類器材須經歐盟公告機構合格評定後方可加貼CE標誌；I類器材（非無菌、非測量、非可重複使用手術類）可自我聲明。NMPA註冊不授予CE標誌。

q.en: Is an EU Authorised Representative mandatory for a Chinese medical device manufacturer?
q.zh: 中国医疗器械制造商是否必须指定欧盟授权代表？
q.zht: 中國醫療器材製造商是否必須指定歐盟授權代表？

a.en: Yes. EU MDR Article 11 mandates that any manufacturer not established in the EU designate an EU Authorised Representative (AR) established in an EU member state. The AR is jointly liable with the manufacturer for MDR compliance and must be registered in EUDAMED before any device is placed on the EU market.
a.zh: 是的。《欧盟医疗器械法规》第11条规定，任何非欧盟境内设立的制造商须指定一名在欧盟成员国境内设立的欧盟授权代表（AR）。授权代表与制造商共同承担MDR合规责任，且须在任何器械投放欧盟市场前在EUDAMED完成注册。
a.zht: 是的。《歐盟醫療器材法規》第11條規定，任何非歐盟境內設立的製造商須指定一名在歐盟成員國境內設立的歐盟授權代表（AR）。授權代表與製造商共同承擔MDR合規責任，且須在任何器材投放歐盟市場前在EUDAMED完成註冊。

q.en: Is a UDI assignment mandatory for medical devices entering the EU?
q.zh: 进入欧盟的医疗器械是否强制要求分配UDI？
q.zht: 進入歐盟的醫療器材是否強制要求分配UDI？

a.en: Yes. EU MDR Article 27 requires manufacturers to assign a Unique Device Identification (UDI) to every device and place the UDI carrier on the label according to class-specific deadlines. Device and actor data must be registered in EUDAMED. UDI assignment is a precondition for lawful EU market access.
a.zh: 是的。《欧盟医疗器械法规》第27条要求制造商为每台器械分配唯一设备标识符（UDI），并按类别规定期限将UDI载体标注于标签上。器械及经济运营者数据须在EUDAMED注册。分配UDI是合法进入欧盟市场的前提条件。
a.zht: 是的。《歐盟醫療器材法規》第27條要求製造商為每台器材分配唯一設備標識符（UDI），並按類別規定期限將UDI載體標注於標籤上。器材及經濟運營者數據須在EUDAMED註冊。分配UDI是合法進入歐盟市場的前提條件。
